text: GP2013 has been characterised to be highly similar to the originator product (innovator rituximab) in terms of primary and higher order structure, post-translational modifications and size heterogeneity. In addition, an extensive suite of functional release tests was performed confirming the biological activity of GP2013 to be the same as the originator product.
headline: Fully Human Written

windows.text: GP2013 has been characterised to be highly similar to the originator product (innovator rituximab) in terms of primary and higher order structure, post-translational modifications and size heterogeneity. In addition, an extensive suite of functional release tests was performed confirming the biological activity of GP2013 to be the same as the originator product.
